entries.name: Adam Banaszek (1)
entries.quote: First entry, first place. Book it.

entries.name: Adam Banaszek (2)
entries.quote: The backup plan is still better than your starter.

entries.name: Adam Kolodziej
entries.quote: No easy fixtures on this side of the bracket.

entries.name: Andrew D (1)
entries.quote: Top bins only. No tap-ins here.

entries.name: Andrew D (2)
entries.quote: Two sheets submitted, double the pressure.

entries.name: Bianca C
entries.quote: Quiet confidence, loud scoreboard.

entries.name: Bogdan
entries.quote: Parking the bus all the way to the podium.

entries.name: Damon Lim
entries.quote: The bracket has been scouted. The group is nervous.

entries.name: Danijel P
entries.quote: Clean sheet mentality, champion energy.

entries.name: Joseph Karam
entries.quote: This pool needed a proper number nine.

entries.name: Lucas Czuchraj
entries.quote: Built for knockout chaos.

entries.name: Lucas Sokolowski
entries.quote: Winning it all, then checking VAR for fun.

entries.name: Marcin
entries.quote: Commissioner by title, contender by destiny.

entries.name: Mat Rapacz (1)
entries.quote: One bracket to rule the standings.

entries.name: Mat Rapacz (2)
entries.quote: The second entry is where the mind games start.

entries.name: Matt C
entries.quote: No mercy after the opening whistle.

entries.name: Matthew Woronko
entries.quote: Form is temporary, bracket genius is forever.

entries.name: Matthew Wozniczka (1)
entries.quote: This sheet came to lift the trophy.

entries.name: Matthew Wozniczka (2)
entries.quote: Squad rotation, same championship standards.

entries.name: Michal (1)
entries.quote: The table will respect the process.

entries.name: Michal (2)
entries.quote: Second lineup, first-place ambitions.

entries.name: Patryk Koscielak
entries.quote: No one can beat this. They can only admire it.

entries.name: Pawel Jaremko (1)
entries.quote: All gas, no group-stage nerves.

entries.name: Pawel Jaremko (2)
entries.quote: Depth chart loaded. The bench scores too.

entries.name: Rana
entries.quote: This bracket has big-match temperament.

entries.name: Robert
entries.quote: Here to turn predictions into victory laps.

entries.name: Tadeusz
entries.quote: Old-school picks, top-table results.

entries.name: Tomasz K (1)
entries.quote: The scouting report says danger everywhere.

entries.name: Tomasz K (2)
entries.quote: Plan B still has trophy parade routes.

entries.name: Varun
entries.quote: Calculated chaos, maximum points.
